response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, and leadership in open-source and cross-functional projects, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and clear customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise GenAI deployments.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems; most AI exposure is recent and implicit
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise cloud AI delivery
